calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Continued To Jan-21-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2542.

Douglas Holloway, Esq., appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
James Roach, Vice President for Bank of the West, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Venesa Crumpley, DDS, PLLC or Venesa Crumpley.
Defaults were entered against defendants on November 9, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on November 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Venesa Crumpley, DDS, PLLC, and Venesa Crumpley as follows:

Damages/Principal - $246,886.28.
Prejudgment Interest - $17,315.84.
Attorney Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $435.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $267,137.12.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the equipment described in the attachment to the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2010 Off Calendar
